title: The Purdue 1 challenge for AAE's Collicott: Don't look out the window
summary_en: Purdue professor's research responsibilities will leave little time for sightseeing during the historic spaceflight
title_cn: 普渡大学教授史蒂文·科利科特将参与2027年“普渡1号”亚轨道飞行任务 优先保障科研实验

title: Purdue Engineering student entrepreneurs receive $50,000 from Purdue Innovates Incubator
summary_en: Purdue Engineering student entrepreneurs won thousands of dollars from the Purdue Innovates Incubator during the finals of the 2026 New Venture Challenge.
title_cn: 普渡大学工科学生创业团队获普渡创新孵化器5万美元赛事奖金

title: Motorsports Engineering Club in Indianapolis places silver at 2026 Purdue Grand Prix
summary_en: Thirty-three drivers and teams competed in “The Greatest Spectacle in College Racing.” Rounding out the winners’ podium were Sam Griffin, driving for Motorsports Engineering Club in Indianapolis — CED Industrial Kart 4, and Ryan Fiorentino, driving for Tark Racing 29.
title_cn: 印第安纳波利斯赛车工程俱乐部在2026年普渡大奖赛中获银牌

title: ME's Cappelleri designs robot to move tiny clumps of cells
summary_en: In tissue engineering, the tiniest bit of improper force can harm a living culture. 3D clumps of cells - known as spheroids - can be used to model complex human tissues, because they can re-create specific cell-to-cell and cell-to-matrix interactions.
title_cn: 美国普渡大学研究团队研发力传感微型机器人 可实现细胞球安全精准操控

title: College recognizes teachers with top evaluation scores
summary_en: The College of Engineering recognized faculty, lecturers and other staff for outstanding dedication to teaching students in a Purdue Exponent ad on March 2.
title_cn: 普渡大学工学院表彰教学评估得分排名前列教职人员
